header.title: Document Health
header.description: Strategic oversight and automated quality assurance for documentation. Monitor content health, identify gaps, validate integrity, and maintain consistency at scale.

pageSections.title: Documentation Health
pageSections.description: Strategic oversight of documentation coverage, content planning, and gap analysis. Track what exists, identify what is missing, and plan future content using the Gap Discovery Engine.

pageSections.title: Quality Engineering
pageSections.description: Automated validation tools for route verification, count accuracy, TOC integrity, pattern compliance, and bulk fix actions. Ensures documentation stays consistent and correct at scale.

highlights.title: Gap Discovery Engine
highlights.description: Automated scanning identifies undocumented routes, missing articles, and content coverage gaps.

highlights.title: Count Validation
highlights.description: Verifies data array counts match documentation claims. Catches stale numbers automatically.

highlights.title: Route Verification
highlights.description: Checks every sidebar navigation link resolves to a real page. Zero broken links guaranteed.

highlights.title: TOC Integrity
highlights.description: Validates table of contents anchors match section IDs. Prevents navigation errors.

highlights.title: Auto Remediation
highlights.description: One-click fixes for common issues. Update counts, add missing anchors, repair cross-references.

highlights.title: Pattern Compliance
highlights.description: Audits components for atomic design adherence and consistent data-driven patterns.

quickLinks.title: Metrics & Analytics
quickLinks.description: Track documentation health scores and quality trends
